Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Bastion]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — Bastion was a founding member of the order and a Soulbound of great renown.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Bastion is Shera's second Soulbound Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Bastion has the power to create mist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Shera relies on Bastion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Shera can tap into Bastion’s power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Bastion provides a peaceful voice to Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Shera placed Bastion inside a sealing box.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — Bastion was the ancestor of the Mistress of the Mists and created Bastion's Veil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Bastion is contained in a head-sized box.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Bastion is a power or ability used by Shera that causes exhaustion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Bastion is a knife used by Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Bastion is an artifact with a hilt that Shera grips.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Bastion is an artifact that leaps for Calder's neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Bastion's blade skated across the Emperor's helmet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Bastion's voice is soothing and focuses on protection, preservation, and concealment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Bastion's power waxes and wanes, affecting the thickness of the mist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Bastion is a weapon Shera lifts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Bastion is a Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Bastion is a weapon with a long history.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Bastion whispers in Shera's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Bastion is one of Shera's Vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Bastion is a Vessel that wants Shera to find a secure room and hunker down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Bastion screamed in Shera's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Bastion is an enemy of the Consultants.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
